    Method CreateFrom

    CreateFrom(Matrix4x4?, Vector3?, Quaternion?, Vector3?)

    Evaluates a Matrix4x4 transform based on the available parameters.

    Declaration
    public static Matrix4x4 CreateFrom(Matrix4x4? transform, Vector3? scale, Quaternion? rotation, Vector3? translation)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Matrix4x4? transform

    A Matrix4x4 instance, or null.
    Vector3? scale

    A Vector3 instance, or null.
    Quaternion? rotation

    A Quaternion instance, or null.
    Vector3? translation

    A Vector3 instance, or null.
    Returns
    Type Description
    Matrix4x4

    A Matrix4x4 transform.
